summary: Full backend + frontend testing of 4 cambios: CAMBIO 1 (new client_id_number/city fields), CAMBIO 3 (edit proforma PUT endpoint + UI), CAMBIO 4 (price_1 only + manual price), and backward compat. All 15 backend pytest tests and all 15 frontend Playwright checks passed.
critical_code_review_comments: openEditDialog() sets product_price_1 from item.unit_price_applied (snapshot at creation time) not current DB price_1 — acceptable since PUT endpoint always re-fetches current price_1, but display in edit modal may show stale price. Low priority.
No DELETE /api/quotes endpoint — test quotes created during backend testing cannot be cleaned up. Minor, doesn't affect functionality.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created several TEST_ quotes (created_quote_id fixture, test_edit_quote_returns_400_if_pagado, test_create_quote_with_*, etc.). These cannot be cleaned up as there is no DELETE /api/quotes endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 cambios fully implemented and tested. Credentials: admin/admin123, empleado1/emp123. QuoterPage has Cedula/RUC (data-testid=client-id-number-input) and Ciudad (data-testid=client-city-input) fields. ProformasPage detail shows these fields when set. Edit dialog (data-testid=edit-proforma-button, save-edit-button, download-updated-pdf-button) all working. No Bulto toggle in quoter items. Pencil (data-testid=edit-price-*) + Precio especial badge working. ScannerPage modal shows only Precio 1 (data-testid=product-price-1). Backend PUT /api/quotes/{id}/items returns 400 for paid proformas. Backward compat: scan endpoint returns price_1, price_2, price_3.

CAMBIO_1_backend: PASS: POST /api/quotes accepts client_id_number (cedula 10-digit) and client_city
PASS: POST /api/quotes without new fields still works (backward compat, returns null for new fields)
PASS: GET /api/quotes/{id} returns client_id_number and client_city
CAMBIO_1_frontend: PASS: QuoterPage - RUC and Ciudad labels shown
PASS: ProformasPage - Detail shows client_id_number (9876543210) with Cedula/RUC label
PASS: ProformasPage - Detail shows client_city (Cuenca) with MapPin icon
CAMBIO_3_backend: PASS: PUT /api/quotes/{id}/items returns 200 and updates items
PASS: PUT recalculates total_amount correctly (price_1 * qty)
PASS: PUT returns 400 with 'pagada' detail when status = pagado
PASS: PUT updates all client fields (name, email, phone, city, id_number)
CAMBIO_3_frontend: PASS: Editar Proforma button visible on non-paid proformas
PASS: Editar Proforma button NOT visible on paid proformas
PASS: Edit modal has edit-client-name, edit-client-id-number, edit-client-city, edit-product-search fields
PASS: Edit modal shows existing items (2 items shown)
PASS: Edit product search returns results
PASS: Guardar Cambios calls PUT endpoint (success toast 'Proforma actualizada exitosamente')
PASS: Descargar PDF Actualizado button appears after save
CAMBIO_4_backend: PASS: POST /api/quotes uses price_1 by default (price_was_manual=False)
PASS: POST /api/quotes with manual_price uses that price (price_was_manual=True)
PASS: qty >= 12 still uses price_1 (old price_2 logic removed)
CAMBIO_4_frontend: PASS: QuoterPage - No Bulto toggle in quoter items
PASS: QuoterPage - Price input (price-input-{id}) appears after clicking pencil
PASS: QuoterPage - 'Precio especial' badge appears after setting custom price
PASS: ScannerPage - Product modal shows only 'Precio 1' (no Precio 2, no Precio 3)
backward_compat: PASS: GET /api/products/scan/{code} returns price_1, price_2, price_3
PASS: GET /api/products returns price_1, price_2, price_3 for all products

rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All 4 cambios are correctly implemented and functioning as expected. The download-updated-pdf-button correctly uses the updated selectedProforma state (set via setSelectedProforma(response.data) on save).
